title: Mythic Metals Decorations
description: Adds various metal-themed decorations for Mythic Metals.
body:
# Mythic Metals Decorations
 

This is the first addon for Mythic Metals, which adds various metal-themed decorations to the mod.



Currently we provide:

* Chains for most metals.  
* Chests of various sizes.  
* Crowns of different colors.

... with more coming along the road!

 

Get Mythic Metals here: https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals/
